schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Map Simplification Process” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to simplify and expedite the approval of residential and commercial property maps through an efficient online system.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Approval of residential maps is being provided within 15 days, and approval of commercial maps within 30 days.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide an efficient online system for landowners in Haridwar district to get approval for their residential and commercial property maps quickly and easily, ensuring transparency and reducing delays.

children.text: The “Map Simplification Process” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to simplify and expedite the approval of residential and commercial property maps through an efficient online system.
Approval of residential maps is being provided within 15 days, and approval of commercial maps within 30 days.

An online system has been set up for landowners in Haridwar district to obtain approval for their private residential and commercial properties. Landowners can submit applications from their homes and have their maps approved within the prescribed time period.

applicationProcess.process_md: An online system has been set up for landowners in Haridwar district to obtain approval for their private residential and commercial properties. Landowners can submit applications from their homes and have their maps approved within the prescribed time period.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

children.text: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.
